settings.title: Settings
settings.connectionsDesc: Live status of all external API connections and data sources.
settings.llmKeysDescription: Configure API keys for AI models used in trading strategies.
settings.hyperliquidHint: 1. Enter your MAIN wallet address (where your USDC is deposited). 2. Enter the Private Key of your API Wallet (generated at app.hyperliquid.xyz/API). The API Wallet trades on behalf of your main wallet but cannot withdraw funds.
settings.hyperliquidTestnetNote: Important: Testnet requires a one-time setup. 1) Deposit at least $5 USDC to your mainnet Hyperliquid account first. 2) Then go to app.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/drip to claim 1,000 mock USDC. Without this, your testnet balance will be 0 and demo trades will fail.
settings.affiliateLinksDesc: Configure affiliate links per exchange. These will be shown in trade screenshots.
settings.validationPrivateKey: Must be 64 hex characters (with or without 0x)
settings.hlBuilderConfigDesc: Configure builder address, fee rate, and referral code
settings.hlNotConfiguredBuilder: Not configured. Set HL_BUILDER_ADDRESS in .env to enable.
settings.hlNotConfiguredReferral: Not configured. Set HL_REFERRAL_CODE in .env to enable.
settings.twoFactorDesc: Protect your account with a TOTP authenticator (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy).
settings.twoFactorScanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
settings.twoFactorEnterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app:
settings.twoFactorBackupWarning: Save these backup codes in a safe place! They will only be shown once.
settings.twoFactorDisableDesc: Enter your password and a current TOTP code to disable 2FA.
settings.twoFactorRegenerateDesc: Enter a current TOTP code to generate new backup codes.

presets.title: Configuration Presets
presets.name: Name
presets.noPresets: No presets yet. Create your first one!

bot.title: Bot Control
bot.noKeysConfigured: No API keys configured for this exchange.

guide.title: Getting Started
guide.subtitle: This guide will help you set up and use the Trading Bot step by step.
guide.prereqDesc: Before you can use the Trading Bot, you need an account at one of the supported exchanges. If you don't have one yet, please register first.
guide.prereqStep1: Register at an exchange via affiliate link
guide.prereqAffiliateHint: Use the affiliate links provided in Settings to support the project.
guide.prereqStep2: Create API keys on the exchange
guide.prereqStep2Hint: Go to Settings → API Keys after registration. Use Demo/Testnet keys for risk-free testing.
guide.prereqStep3: Enter your Exchange UID in Settings
guide.prereqStep3Hint: Your UID can be found in your exchange profile. It is needed for affiliate verification.
guide.step1Desc: Connect your exchange so the bot can trade on your behalf.
guide.step1Detail1: Go to Settings → API Keys and select your exchange.
guide.step1Detail2: Enter your keys, save and test the connection.
guide.step1Detail3: Start with Demo/Testnet keys — no real money needed.
guide.step1Detail4: Start with Demo/Testnet keys to trade without real money.
guide.step2Desc: Use the Bot Builder to create your first trading bot.
guide.step2Detail1: Go to My Bots → New Bot and follow the 4-step wizard.
guide.step2Detail2: Choose a strategy (e.g. Edge Indicator, AI Companion) and configure risk parameters.
guide.step2Detail3: Select your exchange and then pick trading pairs from the dynamic symbol list.
guide.step2Detail4: Configure notifications (Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp) in the final step.
guide.step3Desc: Set appropriate limits to manage your trading risk.
guide.step3Detail1: Leverage: Start low (2-4x). Higher leverage = higher risk.
guide.step3Detail2: Position size 5-10%, Stop Loss 1-2%, Take Profit 2-4%.
guide.step3Detail3: Set daily loss limit (e.g. 5%) — bot pauses automatically.
guide.step3Detail4: Daily Loss Limit: Stop trading after losing this % in a day (e.g. 5%).
guide.step4Desc: Test your bot with real market data but no real money.
guide.step4Detail1: Click 'Start' on your bot — it analyzes markets automatically.
guide.step4Detail2: Monitor performance on Dashboard and Performance pages.
guide.step4Detail3: Only switch to Live mode when demo results are satisfactory.
guide.step4Detail4: Only switch to Live Mode when satisfied with demo results.
guide.step5Desc: Keep track of your trading performance.
guide.step5Detail1: The Trades page shows all executed trades with bot name and exchange.
guide.step5Detail2: The Performance page compares all bots with PnL charts and win rates.
guide.step5Detail3: The Tax Report provides a yearly summary. Export as CSV for your tax filing.
guide.step6Desc: Important notes for safe bot operation.
guide.step6Detail1: Use API keys with restricted permissions (trading only, no withdrawals).
guide.step6Detail2: For Hyperliquid: Always use an API Wallet, never your main wallet key.
guide.step6Detail3: Always start with small position sizes and low leverage.
guide.step6Detail4: Set realistic stop-loss values and monitor the bot regularly.
guide.tipText: Test every new configuration in Demo Mode first. This lets you evaluate the strategy's performance with real-time market data without risking real capital. Only switch to Live Mode once you are satisfied with the results.
guide.exchangeCompSubtitle: Each exchange uses a different authentication method:
guide.exchangeCompSecurityCex: Disable withdrawal permission on API key
guide.featureMatrixSubtitle: Not all exchanges offer the same features. Here's what each one supports:
guide.fm_noteTrailingNative: Native trailing stop: The exchange monitors the price in real-time and closes the position automatically — fastest reaction.
guide.fm_noteTrailingSoftware: Software fallback: The bot checks at each analysis interval whether the price has pulled back from its peak, and closes the position automatically — works on all exchanges.
guide.bitgetSetup1: Log in to bitget.com and go to API Management.
guide.bitgetSetup2: Click 'Create API' and set permissions to 'Trade' only (no withdrawal).
guide.bitgetSetup3: Copy the API Key, Secret Key, and set a Passphrase.
guide.bitgetSetup4: For demo trading: Go to demo.bitget.com, create separate API keys there, and enter them as demo keys.
guide.weexSetup1: Log in to weex.com and go to API Management.
guide.weexSetup2: Create an API key with trading permissions only.
guide.weexSetup3: Copy the API Key, Secret Key, and Passphrase.
guide.weexSetup4: For demo trading: Weex offers paper trading on the same platform. Create separate API keys and enter them as demo keys. The bot detects the mode automatically.
guide.hyperliquidSetup1: Go to app.hyperliquid.xyz and connect your wallet.
guide.hyperliquidSetup3: Click 'Generate API Wallet' — this creates a secure trading-only key.
guide.hyperliquidSetup4: Copy the generated API Wallet Private Key. You also need your main Wallet Address.
guide.hyperliquidSetup5: The API Wallet can trade but CANNOT withdraw — much safer than your main key.
guide.hyperliquidSetup6: For testnet: Use app.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz with a testnet faucet for test funds.
guide.hyperliquidTestnetNote: Important: Testnet requires a one-time setup. 1) Deposit at least $5 USDC to your mainnet Hyperliquid account first. 2) Then go to app.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/drip to claim 1,000 mock USDC. Without this, your testnet balance will be 0 and demo trades will fail.
guide.bitunixSetup1: Log in to bitunix.com and go to API Management.
guide.bitunixSetup2: Create an API key with trading permissions only (no withdrawal).
guide.bitunixSetup3: Copy the API Key and Secret Key.
guide.bitunixSetup4: For demo trading: Bitunix has no public testnet. Use small positions to test, or start with another exchange in demo mode.
guide.bingxSetup1: Log in to bingx.com and go to Account → API Management.
guide.bingxSetup2: Create an API key with trading permissions only (no withdrawal).
guide.bingxSetup3: Copy the API Key and Secret Key. BingX does not require a passphrase.
guide.bingxSetup4: For demo trading: BingX offers VST (Virtual Simulated Trading). Create API keys on the VST platform and enter them as demo keys.
guide.exampleDesc: A conservative bot setup for beginners:
guide.qsSubtitle: Get to your first trade in 4 steps — click any step for details.
guide.stratSubtitle: All available strategies with recommended time intervals.
guide.stratKi: AI analyzes market data and gives LONG/SHORT recommendations
guide.stratSentiment: Combines market sentiment with technical indicators
guide.stratDegen: AI arena with 14 data sources and fixed prompt
guide.stratEdge: EMA Ribbon + ADX Filter + Predator Momentum (v2: optimized exits)
guide.stratContrarianPulse: Contrarian Fear & Greed scalping. Long on extreme fear, short on extreme greed. Confirmed by EMA, RSI and derivatives signals
guide.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to your first trade

bots.title: My Bots
bots.noBots: No bots created yet. Click 'New Bot' to get started.

builder.title: Create New Bot
builder.name: Bot Name
builder.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. BTC scalper on Bitget demo
builder.intervalDesc: Analysis at a custom minute interval
builder.rotationOnlyDesc: Opens a trade on start, then auto-closes and reopens at fixed intervals
builder.tradeRotationDesc: Additionally auto-close and reopen trades at fixed intervals
builder.scheduleKlineWarning: Your analysis interval ({{schedule}}) is shorter than the Kline interval ({{kline}}). The bot will analyze the same candle multiple times without new information. Recommended: analysis interval ≥ Kline interval.
builder.llmNote: This bot uses AI for signal generation. Configure your API key in Settings → LLM Keys.
builder.customPromptPlaceholder: Enter custom instructions for the AI analysis...
builder.dataSourcesDesc: Select which market data your bot should analyze
builder.discordSetupGuide: Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → New Webhook. Select a channel, copy the webhook URL and paste it here.
builder.telegramHint: 1. Open @BotFather on Telegram and create a new bot (/newbot). 2. Copy the bot token here. 3. Start your bot and send a message. 4. Open https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates and copy the chat ID.
builder.whatsappHint: 1. Create an app on developers.facebook.com → WhatsApp → Getting Started. 2. Copy the Phone Number ID and Temporary Access Token. 3. Enter the recipient number with country code (e.g. 4917012345678).
builder.presetLoaded: Preset loaded — adjust settings as needed
builder.maxPairs: Max. 20 pairs. Select from all perpetual futures available on this exchange.
builder.perAssetHint: All fields are optional. Without input, balance is split equally. No leverage (1x), no TP/SL. Trades are closed only by rotation or manually.
builder.fixedStrategyHint: This strategy uses fixed parameters. TP/SL and leverage are managed automatically by the strategy.
builder.leverageHint: Start low (2-3x). Higher leverage = higher risk AND reward.
builder.tpHint: Take Profit: Position closes at this gain. Recommended: 2-4%.
builder.slHint: Stop Loss: Position closes at this loss. Recommended: 1-2%.
builder.noSlWarning: Without Stop-Loss this position is only protected by the strategy exit logic.
builder.noTpSlWarning: Without TP/SL the bot relies entirely on strategy exit signals. Make sure the strategy has exit logic.
builder.temperatureHint: Low = consistent answers · High = more creative analysis · Recommended: 0.2–0.4
builder.paramDesc_risk_profile: Conservative = fewer trades, wide stops, 4h. Standard = balanced, 1h. Aggressive = more trades, tight stops, 15m.
builder.strategyDesc_llm_signal: AI-powered signal generation using Large Language Models. The AI analyzes market data each cycle and delivers LONG/SHORT recommendations with confidence ratings. Backtest note: Not profitable in historical tests — all timeframes negative. Only recommended with custom prompt tuning.
builder.strategyDesc_sentiment_surfer: Combines market sentiment with technical indicators to predict price movements. Uses news sentiment, Fear & Greed, VWAP, Supertrend and spot data. Requires agreement across multiple sources. Backtest note: Conservative strategy with few trades and low drawdown, but slightly negative across all timeframes.
builder.strategyDesc_liquidation_hunter: Contrarian strategy that trades against crowded positions. Analyzes long/short ratios, funding rates and Fear & Greed to detect liquidation cascades early. Backtest note: Best on 15m (+2.0%, Sharpe 1.07). Significantly negative on higher timeframes (1h–1d).
builder.strategyDesc_degen: AI-driven arena strategy with a fixed prompt and 14 data sources. Uses derivatives, order book, Supertrend, VWAP and more for 1h BTC predictions. Inspired by the Degen Prediction Bot. Backtest note: Highest return on 4h (+18.8%, Sharpe 1.43), but also highest drawdown (~21%). For risk-tolerant users only.
builder.strategyDesc_contrarian_pulse: Contrarian Fear & Greed scalping strategy for BTC. Uses the F&G Index as contrarian indicator: Long on extreme fear (<30), Short on extreme greed (>70). Confirmed by 50/200 EMA trend, RSI and derivatives signals (CVD, Long/Short Ratio, Volume, Open Interest, Funding Rate). Pure algorithmic — no LLM required. Default: HOLD when F&G is neutral (30-70).
builder.strategyDesc_edge_indicator: Technical analysis based on the TradingView "Trading Edge" indicator. EMA 8/21 Ribbon, ADX Chop Filter and Predator Momentum Score. v2: Optimized exit thresholds let profitable trades run longer (+3x returns on 1h in backtests). Kline data only, no external APIs. Backtest (90d, 10 coins): 1h avg +6.2% Sharpe 0.67, 4h 18/20 coins profitable. Recommended for beginners.
builder.noExchangeConnection: No API keys configured for {{exchange}} ({{mode}}). Set up in Settings → Exchanges.
builder.overAllocatedWarning: Over-allocated: existing bots already use {{pct}}% of your balance.
builder.insufficientBalanceWarning: This bot would need ${{needed}} but only ${{available}} is available.
builder.bothModeNote: "Both" mode: showing live balance (the limiting factor).

errors.dataSourcesRequired: Please select at least one data source

errors.rotationMinimum: Rotation interval must be at least 5 minutes
errors.intervalMinimum: Interval must be at least 5 minutes
errors.hoursRequired: Please select at least one hour
errors.symbolConflicts: Cannot save: trading pairs conflict with an existing bot.

builder.symbolConflictHint: Each exchange only allows one position per symbol. Disable the existing bot or choose different trading pairs.
builder.marginModeHint: Cross: Margin is shared across all positions. Isolated: Each position has its own margin budget.

performance.noData: No data yet. Start bots to see performance.

builderFee.title: Hyperliquid Activation
builderFee.description: A one-time confirmation with your wallet is required to use Hyperliquid bots. Connect your main Hyperliquid wallet and confirm the transaction.
builderFee.signHint: Confirm the transaction in your wallet. This is a one-time action — after this, you can start any Hyperliquid bot without being asked again.
builderFee.approvedHint: You can now use all Hyperliquid bots. This confirmation will not be requested again.
builderFee.required: One-time activation required before starting Hyperliquid bots.
builderFee.affiliateHint: Don't have a Hyperliquid account yet? Sign up with our link:
builderFee.notConfigured: Hyperliquid is not configured on this server.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.loadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.

affiliate.uidRequired: Please enter your exchange UID in the settings.
affiliate.uidHint: Please register via the affiliate link below. Then find your UID in your exchange profile, enter it here, and save.
affiliate.referralHint: Register via the referral link below on Hyperliquid. Verification is done automatically via the Hyperliquid API.
affiliate.manualHint: No affiliate API – please verify in the exchange partner portal
affiliate.autoFailed: Auto-verify failed – manual check may be needed

backtest.title: Backtest Lab
backtest.subtitle: Test your strategies on historical market data and analyze performance before risking real capital.
backtest.strategyDesc: Choose the trading strategy you want to test
backtest.symbolDesc: The crypto trading pair for the backtest
backtest.periodDesc: Start and end date of the backtest
backtest.customPromptHint: Optional prompt for AI analysis (AI Companion only)
backtest.noHistory: No backtests run yet. Start your first backtest above.
backtest.noResults: Start a backtest to see results
backtest.llmNote: Note: Backtests do not call the actual AI — a simplified algorithm is used instead. Real AI performance can only be evaluated in live or demo mode.
backtest.tooltipTotalReturn: Change in portfolio value as a percentage.
backtest.tooltipWinRate: Percentage of profitable trades out of all trades.
backtest.tooltipMaxDrawdown: Largest peak-to-trough decline. Shows maximum downside risk.
backtest.tooltipSharpeRatio: Return per unit of risk. Higher is better.
backtest.tooltipProfitFactor: Ratio of gross profits to gross losses.
backtest.tooltipTotalTrades: Total trades split into wins (W) and losses (L).
backtest.tooltipStartingCapital: The simulated starting capital used to begin the backtest.
backtest.tooltipEndingCapital: The portfolio value at the end of the backtest period.
backtest.celebrationMessage: Your strategy shows excellent performance metrics. Review the results carefully before risking real capital.
backtest.dateLimitInfo: Max. {{maxDays}} days for {{timeframe}} | Data available from 2020-01-01
backtest.dateLimitExceeded: Period too long: max. {{maxDays}} days for {{timeframe}} (selected: {{actualDays}} days)
backtest.dateFuture: End date cannot be in the future

tour.botsNewBotDesc: Click here to create a new trading bot. A wizard guides you through 6 steps: name, strategy, trading pairs & risk, exchange & mode, schedule and summary.
tour.botsBotCardDesc: Each card shows a bot with its status, exchange, mode (Demo/Live), strategy and trading pairs. Green dot = bot is actively running. Click the bot name for the detail page.
tour.botsStatsDesc: Three key metrics per bot: total PnL (profit/loss), number of completed trades and currently open positions.
tour.botsActionsDesc: Start or stop the bot, view trade history, edit configuration, duplicate or delete it. Editing is locked while running.
tour.dashPnlDesc: Four key metrics at a glance: total PnL (incl. fees and funding), win rate with wins/losses, best trade and worst trade in the selected period.
tour.dashChartsDesc: On the left you see PnL over time as bar and line chart. On the right the overall win rate across all trades with number of wins and losses.
tour.dashTradesDesc: All recently executed trades with date, bot name, symbol, direction (Long/Short), entry price, PnL, mode (Demo/Live) and status.
tour.guidePrereqDesc: Before you start, register at a supported exchange and create API keys. Enter your UID in Settings for affiliate verification.
tour.guideQuickstartDesc: Follow these 4 steps to your first trade. Click any step to jump directly to the relevant page.
tour.guideHowItWorksDesc: Three simple steps: connect your exchange, configure a bot, and start trading. Each card shows exactly what to do.
tour.guideStrategiesDesc: Overview of all trading strategies and a conservative example configuration. Choose a strategy and risk level that fits your style.
tour.guideExchangesDesc: Compare supported exchanges and follow the step-by-step setup instructions for your specific exchange.
tour.settingsTabsDesc: Switch between API Keys, LLM Keys and Connections tabs to configure different aspects of your trading setup.
tour.settingsApiKeysDesc: Enter your exchange API keys here. Each exchange has its own section with Live and Demo key forms.
tour.settingsTestConnDesc: After saving your keys, click 'Test Connection' to verify everything is configured correctly.
